palette: Industrial rust, oxidized copper, charcoal, neon magenta (cherry blossom at night), flickering fluorescent.
lighting: Flickering fluorescent in a massive warehouse with harsh shadows and soft pink-white cherry blossom petals caught in the wind.
material_friction: Rusted corrugated iron, damp concrete, polished steel, and biomimetic skin (silicone/polymer) textures.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A massive, rusted corrugated iron warehouse in Kitakagaya, Osaka. High-angle POV looking down into a workshop where a humanoid robot's arm is being assembled. Polished concrete floors, flickering fluorescent lights overhead. Soft pink cherry blossom petals on the dark asphalt outside the open door. Industrial rust and charcoal palette. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. Extreme close-up of a humanoid robot's biomimetic skin (silicone polymer) being tested with a tactile probe. The texture is incredibly realistic, slightly translucent. In the background, the blurred industrial workshop with oxidized copper pipes and neon magenta accents. Harsh shadows, high contrast. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.

First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture. A rainy street in Kitakagaya at dusk. Neon signs in Japanese reflecting on the wet asphalt and rusted iron fences. A humanoid robot, NEXTAGE Fillie, stands in a doorway, its expressive face glowing with a soft blue light. The air is thick with the scent of damp concrete and ozone. Dark teal and amber tones with neon magenta highlights. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.
